description: Selected business direction from L1 discovery phase

direction.name: AI Operations Consulting
direction.market: Mid-market companies (50-500 employees) looking to integrate AI into their operations without hiring a full-time AI team
direction.positioning: Fractional AI strategist — helps companies identify, prioritize, and implement AI use cases that actually save time and money, not just demo well
direction.revenueModel: Project-based ($5,000-$25,000 per engagement) with optional monthly retainer ($2,000-$5,000/mo) for ongoing optimization
direction.differentiator: Hands-on implementation, not just slide decks. Every engagement delivers a working prototype or automated workflow, not a 50-page strategy document.
direction.targetCustomer: Operations and engineering leaders at mid-market companies who have budget for AI but don't know where to start or have been burned by vaporware vendors
risks: Consulting revenue is linear — trading time for money without leverage
Client expectations may exceed what's deliverable in short engagements
Market education needed — many companies think they need AI when they need better processes

alternatives.name: Data Analytics Consulting
alternatives.reason_rejected: Highly commoditized — too many competing firms with established reputations

alternatives.name: AI Training Workshops
alternatives.reason_rejected: Lower per-engagement revenue, requires course material development upfront
